index aaa..bbb 100644
--- a/src/utils.py
+++ b/src/utils.py
@@ -5,3 +5,6 @@ def process_items(items):
     results = []

+        results.append(items[i].strip())
+    return results

expected_issues.description: Off-by-one: range starts at 1, skipping first item
